title: Skeletal Items Pack
description: Skeletal Items Pack A Mod Made By Hampter adds Bone Items
body:
Skelepickaxe: Mine efficiently with the bone-crafted Skelepickaxe, enhancing your resource-gathering expeditions.

Milk: Stay hydrated and energized with refreshing Milk, sourced from the finest cows in Minecraft. (cannot be obtained in creative must be obtained in survival)

Bone Battleaxe: Crush enemies with the Bone Battleaxe, delivering bone-chilling strikes and igniting foes on fire.

Unleash the power of bone with the Skeletal Items Mod for Minecraft. Explore new depths, stay refreshed, and dominate foes with bone-crafted weaponry
